steps: Find existing map by display name in maps list
IF found: dispose old texture, remove from list, reuse file path
ELSE: findFile(name) → sanitize filename, find unique path in customMapDirectory
Create Map object (file, world.width, world.height, tags)
IF NOT headless: scan all tiles for CoreBlock (collect teams) and spawn blocks (count spawns)
IF preview already loaded in Core.assets: unload it
Read version int → get SaveVersion via SaveIO.getSaveWriter(version)
IF ver == null: throw IOException (unknown version)
Create Pixmap floors(width,height) and Pixmap walls(width,height)
Create CachedTile with overridden setBlock: calls colorFor(), draws wall color + shade on walls/floors pixmaps
create(x,y,floorID,overlayID,wallID): sets floor pixel color; counts spawns; stores floorIds[]
tile(index): maps index to x/y on CachedTile
onReadBuilding: draws team color for building tiles; tracks CoreBlock teams in map.teams
onReadTileData: draws block minimapColor or floor minimapColor
setBlock override: draws non-air wall color + shadow
floors.draw(walls, true) → composite walls over floors
IF block is non-synthetic and non-air: color = block.minimapColor(tile)
ELSE IF overlay==air AND block==air: color = floor.minimapColor(tile)
IF color==0: color = colorFor(block, floor, overlay, team)
Core.assets.load(AssetDescriptor with MapPreviewParameter) → on loaded: map.texture = t
[MapPreviewLoader.loadAsync: tries super.loadAsync on sibling file; on error → maps.queueNewPreview(map)]
[MapPreviewLoader.loadSync: tries super.loadSync; on error → new Texture(file); on 2nd error → error.png]
END: all maps queued or loaded
createAllPreviews(): Core.app.post() → for each map in previewList → createNewPreview(map, errorHandler)
loadMap(dest, true) → MapIO.createMap(dest, true) → reads meta tags → returns Map
on error: maps.remove(map); map.file.delete(); rethrow as IOException
ver.readRegion('meta') → readStringMap → tags (width, height, name, etc.)
END: return new Map(file, width, height, tags, custom, version, Version.build)
START: loadMap(Map map) or loadMap(Map map, WorldContext cons)
writeImage(Tiles): iterate tiles → pick block.mapColor or floor.mapColor → set pixmap pixel (y-flipped)
readImage(Pixmap, Tiles): iterate tiles → pixmap.get(x, height-1-y) → ColorMapper.get(color) → Block
skip buildings; set overlay / floor / multiblock / wall as appropriate
second pass: any tile with floor==air → setFloor(Blocks.stone)
setup(): clear processors list; scan world.tiles.eachTile for isCenter+worldProcessor blocks; collect into processors Seq; call rebuild()
ELSE: for each LogicBuild matching search text:
Render icon button → iconSelect.show() to change iconTag
Render pencil/edit button → ui.showTextInput to rename tag → setup()
IF state.isGame && isEditor: render eye button → hide(); showConfig(build); panCamera(build)
Render trash button → ui.showConfirm → check surrounding tiles; setNet(air or wall); processors.remove(build); rebuild()
ADD button: scan world grid for first non-synthetic tile → tile.setNet(Blocks.worldProcessor, Team.sharded, 0); editor.renderer.updateStatic(x,y); setup()
Reflect: locate mindustry.game.Rules class fields: fog, rules(in GameState), schematics, staticFog
Register Events.on(WorldLoadEvent): record if net.client() and fog/schematic states
Register Events.on(ResetEvent): reset all flags to false
Register Events.run(Trigger.update, check): if flags set, override fog/schematic fields via reflection
checkPreviews(): runs check Runnable each frame if set

key_relationships: Maps uses MapIO.writeMap to persist map files
Maps uses MapIO.createMap to load map metadata
Maps uses MapIO.generatePreview(Map) and MapIO.generatePreview(Tiles) to create preview Pixmaps
Maps delegates asset loading of previews to MapPreviewLoader (registered as TextureLoader)
Maps.createNewPreview → MapIO.generatePreview(map) → writes PNG async via mainExecutor
MapProcessorsDialog scans world.tiles to find worldProcessor buildings
MapProcessorsDialog uses LogicBuild.showEditDialog and ui.showTextInput for editing
MapIO.readImage/writeImage use ColorMapper for color-to-block mapping
MapIO.generatePreview(Map) uses SaveIO for binary format, WorldContext for tile rendering
Maps.writeCache/readCache store lightweight metadata (spawns, teams) alongside preview
important_conditions: generatePreview(Map): SaveVersion must not be null (throws if unknown version)
saveMap: headless mode skips preview generation entirely
loadPreviews: preview file existence determines load vs queue path
MapProcessorsDialog add: no non-synthetic tile found → error message
MapProcessorsDialog delete: surrounded by privileged/static tiles → replace with wall; else → air
readImage: buildings (hasBuilding()) are skipped; second pass defaults air floors to stone
important_notes: MapPreviewLoader.setupLoaders contains obfuscated reflection code using byte arrays to encode class/field names (mindustry.game.Rules, fields: fog, schematics, staticFog) — it manipulates game rules for multiplayer clients on WorldLoadEvent/Trigger.update. Maps uses a mainExecutor for async PNG/cache writes. MapIO uses deflate (InflaterInputStream) for all map file I/O. Preview cache (.cache) stores spawn count + team IDs separately from the preview PNG.
